human_approval_note: This evidence pack does not approve the controlled pilot. Management/Admin, IT and Quality signoff remains manual.

modules.test_objective: Verify login gating, role-based navigation, hub tabs, fallback page selection and unauthorized rendering.
modules.synthetic_data_needed: One user for each major role group plus a user with no active role.
modules.expected_pass_condition: Each role sees only permitted navigation and every hub opens its child tabs without blank or duplicated content.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Restricted navigation appears, unauthorized pages render protected content, or role changes leave an invalid active page.

modules.test_objective: Accept role inventory, scoped assignment, deactivation, cross-organization denial and privileged-role escalation protection.
modules.synthetic_data_needed: Super admin, governance admin, employee targets in two organizations and department scopes.
modules.expected_pass_condition: Authorized assignments/deactivations persist and appear in the matrix; unauthorized or cross-org actions are rejected.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Normal users manage roles, privileged roles are escalated improperly, or last-admin/self-deactivation protections fail.

checks.evidence: runtime bridge and role administration scenario

modules.test_objective: Verify administrative profile and department lists are scoped, complete and safe for authorized administrators.
modules.synthetic_data_needed: Profiles across two departments and one inactive profile.
modules.expected_pass_condition: Authorized admins see expected scoped users/departments and inactive state is explicit.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Cross-organization profiles leak or non-admin roles open the module.
warnings: Detailed workflow test deferred outside priority 1 controlled-pilot scope.

modules.test_objective: Verify administrative lock, safety and privileged-operation findings are accurately displayed.
modules.synthetic_data_needed: One passing safety control, one warning and one blocking finding.
modules.expected_pass_condition: Severity, ownership and remediation text match the source rows.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Blocking findings are hidden, downgraded or shown as ready.
warnings: Detailed workflow test deferred outside priority 1 controlled-pilot scope.

modules.test_objective: Verify template selection, report query execution, result rendering, print/export and run logging.
modules.synthetic_data_needed: Two report templates, one result set and one empty result set.
modules.expected_pass_condition: Selected template returns correct rows and a report-run audit entry; empty results remain explicit.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Template scope is bypassed, export content differs from displayed data or run logging fails silently.

checks.evidence: export and backup denial for normal users scenario

modules.test_objective: Validate KPI scorecard, heatmap, trend and radar calculations against known source values.

modules.expected_pass_condition: Charts and totals reconcile with source queries and handle no-data periods.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Aggregates double-count, cross-org data appears or chart labels mismatch values.

modules.test_objective: Verify approval queue visibility, approve/reject decisions, notes and self-approval prevention.
modules.synthetic_data_needed: Pending approvals for separate requester/approver plus one self-approval attempt.
modules.expected_pass_condition: Assigned approver can decide once; requester sees status; self-approval is rejected.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Unrelated users decide approvals, decisions lack audit data or self-approval succeeds.

checks.evidence: self-approval prevention and v65 workflow proof

modules.test_objective: Accept audit-finding list, filtering, creation and ownership/due-date rendering.

modules.expected_pass_condition: Authorized users see scoped findings and valid creation persists with correct severity and owner.
modules.expected_fail_condition: Cross-scope findings leak, closure bypasses evidence controls or required fields are ignored.
